task_completion.description: Open the Wave Drag analysis tool in OpenVSP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP GUI is visible with the 'Wave Drag' analysis dialog window open.

task_completion.description: Configure the Mach number, slicing planes, theta rotations, and component selection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Wave Drag dialog, the Mach Number field is set to 1.05, Num Slices is set to 40 or greater, and Num Rotations is set to 20 or greater. The Wing, Fuselage, and Tail components are checked or listed in the included components section.

task_completion.description: Run the wave drag analysis and observe the results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Wave Drag tool displays computation results, specifically showing a calculated Wave Drag Coefficient (CDwave) value in the output text area, log, or results window.

task_completion.description: Write a summary report containing the required analysis parameters and the resulting CDwave.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window shows the contents of 'wave_drag_report.txt' located on the Desktop. The text includes Mach 1.05, the number of slices, the number of rotations, and the numeric CDwave value obtained from the OpenVSP analysis.

task_completion.description: Save the model with the analysis settings to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP 'Save As' dialog is visible saving the file as 'eCRM-001_wave_drag.vsp3' in the /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/ directory, or the OpenVSP main window title bar updates to show 'eCRM-001_wave_drag.vsp3'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenVSP GUI to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the OpenVSP menus (Analysis > Wave Drag) and typing into the parameter fields, rather than just writing a text report.

integrity.description: The CDwave value in the report matches the actual OpenVSP output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numeric CDwave value typed into the text report exactly matches the value displayed in the OpenVSP Wave Drag results window.

integrity.description: The model was saved using the OpenVSP application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used OpenVSP's File > Save As menu to save the .vsp3 file, ensuring the analysis settings are embedded, rather than just copying or renaming the file in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Mach number is exactly 1.05. The minimum number of slicing planes is 40. The minimum number of theta rotations is 20. The summary report must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/wave_drag_report.txt. The OpenVSP model must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_wave_drag.vsp3.
